subject: docs(todo): strike items confirmed done in 2026-04-17 audit
body:
Re-audited all 10 downstream repos via GitHub API. Removed items that
are already implemented on the actual repos, updated gap matrix, and
refreshed Cross-Cutting Gaps summary.

Changes per repo:
- canva-grid: ICON_CACHE_BUST core plumbing done
- repo-tor: HISTORY.md already removed; ICON_CACHE_BUST core done
- budgy-ting: BURGER_MENU + DEBUG_SYSTEM fully resolved (now Pass)
- model-pear: APP_ICONS fully done (now Pass); DEBUG foundations
  present; Implementation Patterns section already exists
- see-veo: DEBUG PWA Diagnostics tab already present
- few-lap: Suggested Implementations section already deleted;
  flash prevention script present
- sun-sea-o: maskable 1024px + clipboard fallback + inline pill done
- four-ems: PWA 30-second suppression done
- graphiki: PWA module singleton (install prompt) done
- synctone: flash prevention script present

Tags: documentation, audit, todo

Urgency: 2
